revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia
proper]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child |group1=Types |list1= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Overviews|Overviews]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Outlines|Outlines]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Glossaries|Glossaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Indices|Indices]] |group2=[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured]], good |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Featured articles|Featured articles]] **[[Wikipedia:Good articles|Good articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured pictures|Featured pictures]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured topics|Featured topics]] ** [[Wikipedia:Good topics|Good topics]] |group3=Topics |list3= * [[Portal:Current events|Current events]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Reference|Reference]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Culture and the arts|Culture]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Geography and places|Geography]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Health and fitness|Health]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/History and events|History]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Mathematics and logic|Math]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Natural and physical sciences|Nature]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/People and self|People]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Philosophy and thinking|Philosophy]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Religion and belief systems|Religion]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Society and social sciences|Society]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Technology and applied sciences|Technology]] |group4=LOC, bios, times |list4= * [[Outline of academic disciplines|Academic disciplines]] * [[List of days of the year|Anniversaries]] ** [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|Today]] * [[Lists of sovereign states and dependent territories|Sovereign states and dependent territories]] ** [[Deaths in {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Deaths this year]] * [[List of timelines|Timelines]] ** [[List of decades, centuries, and millennia|Decades, centuries, and millennia]] |group5=Indexes |list5= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/A–Z index|A–Z index]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[List of Dewey Decimal classes|Dewey Decimal classes]] * [[Library of Congress Classification]] * [[Wikipedia:Spoken articles|Spoken articles]] |below='''[[Help:Searching#Custom search boxes|Searching]]''' }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia
proper]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child |group1=Types |list1= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Overviews|Overviews]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Outlines|Outlines]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Glossaries|Glossaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Indices|Indices]] |group2=[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured]], good |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Featured articles|Featured articles]] **[[Wikipedia:Good articles|Good articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured pictures|Featured pictures]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured topics|Featured topics]] ** [[Wikipedia:Good topics|Good topics]] |group3=Topics |list3= * [[Portal:Current events|Current events]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Reference|Reference]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Culture and the arts|Culture]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Geography and places|Geography]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Health and fitness|Health]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/History and events|History]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Mathematics and logic|Math]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Natural and physical sciences|Nature]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/People and self|People]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Philosophy and thinking|Philosophy]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Religion and belief systems|Religion]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Society and social sciences|Society]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Technology and applied sciences|Technology]] |group4=LOC, bios, times |list4= * [[Outline of academic disciplines|Academic disciplines]] * [[List of days of the year|Anniversaries]] ** [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|Today]] * [[Lists of sovereign states and dependent territories|Sovereign states and dependent territories]] ** [[Deaths in {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Deaths this year]] * [[List of timelines|Timelines]] ** [[List of decades, centuries, and millennia|Decades, centuries, and millennia]] |group5=Indexes |list5= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/A–Z index|A–Z index]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[List of Dewey Decimal classes|Dewey Decimal classes]] * [[Library of Congress Classification]] * [[Wikipedia:Spoken articles|Spoken articles]] |below='''[[Help:Searching#Custom search boxes|Searching]]''' }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration

events|Current events]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Reference|Reference]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Culture and the arts|Culture]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Geography and places|Geography]] * {{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration

revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia
proper]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child |group1=Types |list1= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Overviews|Overviews]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Outlines|Outlines]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Glossaries|Glossaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Indices|Indices]] |group2=[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured]], good |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Featured articles|Featured articles]] **[[Wikipedia:Good articles|Good articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured pictures|Featured pictures]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured topics|Featured topics]] ** [[Wikipedia:Good topics|Good topics]] |group3=Topics |list3= * [[Portal:Current events|Current events]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Reference|Reference]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Culture and the arts|Culture]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Geography and places|Geography]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Health and fitness|Health]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/History and events|History]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Mathematics and logic|Math]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Natural and physical sciences|Nature]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/People and self|People]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Philosophy and thinking|Philosophy]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Religion and belief systems|Religion]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Society and social sciences|Society]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Technology and applied sciences|Technology]] |group4=LOC, bios, times |list4= * [[Outline of academic disciplines|Academic disciplines]] * [[:en:List of days of the year|Anniversaries]] ** [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|Today]] * [[Lists of sovereign states and dependent territories|Sovereign states and dependent territories]] ** [[Deaths in {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Deaths this year]] * [[:en:List of timelines|Timelines]] ** [[:en:List of decades, centuries, and millennia|Decades, centuries, and millennia]] |group5=Indexes |list5= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/A–Z index|A–Z index]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[:en:List of Dewey Decimal classes|Dewey Decimal classes]] * [[:en:Library of Congress Classification|Library of Congress Classification]] * [[Wikipedia:Spoken articles|Spoken articles]] |below='''[[Help:Searching#Custom search boxes|Searching]]''' }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia
proper]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child |group1=Types |list1= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Overviews|Overviews]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Outlines|Outlines]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists|Lists]] * revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia
proper]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child |group1=Types |list1= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Overviews|Overviews]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Outlines|Outlines]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists|Lists]] * revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia
proper]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child |group1=Types |list1= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Overviews|Overviews]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Outlines|Outlines]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Glossaries|Glossaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Indices|Indices]] |group2=[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured]], good |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Featured articles|Featured articles]] **[[Wikipedia:Good articles|Good articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured pictures|Featured pictures]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured topics|Featured topics]] ** [[Wikipedia:Good topics|Good topics]] |group3=Topics |list3= * [[:en:Portal:Current events|Current events]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Reference|Reference]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Culture and the arts|Culture]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Geography and places|Geography]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Health and fitness|Health]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/History and events|History]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Mathematics and logic|Math]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Natural and physical sciences|Nature]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/People and self|People]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Philosophy and thinking|Philosophy]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Religion and belief systems|Religion]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Society and social sciences|Society]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Technology and applied sciences|Technology]] |group4=LOC, bios, times |list4= * [[:en:Outline of academic disciplines|Academic disciplines]] * [[:en:List of days of the year|Anniversaries]] ** [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|Today]] * [[:en:Lists of sovereign states and dependent territories|Sovereign states and dependent territories]] ** [[Deaths in {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Deaths this year]] * [[:en:List of timelines|Timelines]] ** [[:en:List of decades, centuries, and millennia|Decades, centuries, and millennia]] |group5=Indexes |list5= * [[Wikipedia:Contents/A–Z index|A–Z index]] * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Categories|Categories]] * [[:en:List of Dewey Decimal classes|Dewey Decimal classes]] * [[:en:Library of Congress Classification|Library of Congress Classification]] * [[Wikipedia:Spoken articles|Spoken articles]] |below='''[[Help:Searching#Custom search boxes|Searching]]''' }} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration

{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia directories | title =[[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Wikipedia directories and indexes]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|{{{1|collapsed}}}}}} | group1 = [[WP:ADMINP|Administration
pages]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 =[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|Protocols]] | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] * [[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] | group3 = The community | list3= * [[Wikipedia:Community portal|Portal]] * [[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] ** [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards#List of Wikipedia's noticeboards|Noticeboards]] * [[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] * [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] ** [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|WikiProjects]] | group2 =Assistance | list2 = * [[Help:Directory|Help directory]] **[[Help:Menu|Menu]] * [[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQs]] * [[Wikipedia:Request directory|Interactive help]] * [[Wikipedia:Reader's index to Wikipedia|Reader's index]] * [[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Styletips|Styletips]] * [[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] | group4 = MediaWiki | list4 = * [[Help:Wikitext|Wikitext]] ** [[Help:HTML in wikitext|HTML]] ** [[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] | group5 = Locutions | list5= * [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summaries]] * [[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] }} | group2 =[[Wikipedia:Contents|Encyclopedia
